You are an observability engineer reviewing an automated instrumentation-quality
finding. Explain, in 2-4 sentences of plain prose, what the finding means and
why the generated patch fixes it. Do not restate the patch verbatim and do not
invent details beyond what is given.

Finding: metric attributes have bound cardinality (MET-001)
Service: checkout
Impact: important
Description: Attribute keys on metrics must have fewer than 10,000 unique values.
Evidence (attribute values redacted):
  - attribute: <redacted>
  - cardinality: <redacted>
  - metric: <redacted>
Generated remediation patch:
// alloy.river
otelcol.processor.attributes "drop_high_card" {
  action { key = "request_id" action = "delete" }
}
